transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Meridian Health Navigator. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I want to know if my plan covers a dermatologist visit. I have a mole I want checked.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, let me pull that up. Can I get your name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I see you're on the Bluewell Silver Plan. Looking at your coverage, physical therapy visits require a fifty dollar copay and prior authorization after six visits.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Um, that's not what I asked. I asked about a dermatologist, not physical therapy.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're right, let me recheck that. Sorry about the mix-up, one moment.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, here we go. Dermatology visits are covered under your plan with a thirty dollar copay, no referral needed.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Perfect, that's what I needed to know. Thanks.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome, Carla. Anything else I can help with today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: No, that's all. Have a good one.
